title: Architect Incident Command Systems (ICS)
description: Define clear roles and responsibilities within an Incident Command System (ICS) during critical outages. Establish operational discipline to prevent the "Bystander Effect" during Sev-1 incidents. Design an organizational structure for effective incident management and coordination.
objectives: Define clear roles and responsibilities within an Incident Command System (ICS) during critical outages.
Establish operational discipline to prevent the "Bystander Effect" during Sev-1 incidents.
Design an organizational structure for effective incident management and coordination.
